commands.review_summary:
The branch passes `validateCatalog: false` to the interactive `openclaw agents add` model warning call, adds a regression test for that option, and updates several child-process test mocks.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +75. Total +76 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main omits `validateCatalog: false`, and the helper loads the uncached model catalog unless that option is set. I did not run a live CLI reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The branch already contains the concrete code repair; the remaining action is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus normal maintainer merge gating.

target.title: fix #76284: [Bug]: openclaw agents add blocked — cannot add Jon/Atlas as separate agents
target.body:
## Summary

- Skip live model catalog validation during the interactive `openclaw agents add` model warning step.
- Add regression coverage that the agents add wizard passes `validateCatalog: false`, matching the setup wizard behavior.

Fixes openclaw/openclaw#76284.

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** The interactive agents add wizard called `warnIfModelConfigLooksOff` without disabling catalog validation. The helper defaults to uncached model catalog loading unless `validateCatalog: false` is provided, so the add flow could block on provider/catalog validation before finishing agent creation.

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agents.add.test.ts src/commands/auth-choice.model-check.test.ts`
- `LANG=C.UTF-8 LANGUAGE=en LC_ALL=C.UTF-8 OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/wizard/setup.test.ts`

## Regression Test Plan

- **Target test file:** `src/commands/agents.add.test.ts`

- Focused regression coverage in `src/commands/agents.add.test.ts` for the interactive agents add wizard option.
- Existing model-check tests continue to cover `warnIfModelConfigLooksOff` catalog-validation behavior.
- Existing setup wizard tests continue to cover the sibling setup flow that already skips catalog validation.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** The interactive `openclaw agents add` wizard no longer reaches the uncached model catalog validation path while checking the new agent model configuration.
- **Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw source checkout on Linux with Node/Vitest via repository test wrappers.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran the focused agents add/model-check regression tests and the setup wizard regression test listed above.
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal capture from focused tests:

```text
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  15 passed (15)

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  19 passed (19)
```

`src/commands/agents.add.test.ts` now asserts the interactive wizard calls `warnIfModelConfigLooksOff` with `validateCatalog: false`; both focused test commands passed.
- **Observed result after fix:** 15 command/model-check tests passed and 19 setup wizard tests passed.
- **What was not tested:** A live macOS npm-installed `openclaw agents add` session was not run in this Linux source checkout.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
